metadata.name: zkRune Groth16 Verifier
metadata.description: On-chain zero-knowledge proof verifier using Groth16 pairing checks via Solana altbn254 syscalls

instructions.name: verifyProof
docs: Verifies a Groth16 zero-knowledge proof for a given circuit template.
The proof is verified using BN254 elliptic curve pairing checks.
If verification succeeds, the instruction completes. If it fails, the transaction is rejected.

args.name: proofA
docs: G1 point (64 bytes) - first component of the Groth16 proof

args.name: proofB
docs: G2 point (128 bytes) - second component of the Groth16 proof

args.name: proofC
docs: G1 point (64 bytes) - third component of the Groth16 proof

args.name: publicInputs
docs: Public inputs (n × 32 bytes) - the public signals verified by the proof

errors.name: InvalidInstructionData
errors.msg: Instruction data too short or malformed

errors.name: InputCountMismatch
errors.msg: Number of public inputs does not match the verification key
